Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01020}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=3-hydroxy-5-methyl-1-naphthoate + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3-methoxy-5-methyl-1-naphthoate + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:18577, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:78252, ChEBI:CHEBI:78620; EC=2.1.1.302; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:20485749};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase that mediates the formation of 3-methoxy-5-methyl-1-naphthoate from 3-hydroxy-5-methyl-1-naphthoate in the biosynthesis of the antitumor antibiotic azinomycin B. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:20485749}.
